name: Product Launch
description: 42-day full-funnel product launch campaign from awareness through post-launch retention.

phases.name: awareness
phases.label: Awareness & Teaser
phases.goal: Build anticipation and establish the problem your product solves. Grow audience and email list.
themeBank: Behind the Scenes: Building in Public

phases.name: consideration
phases.label: Consideration & Education
phases.goal: Educate prospects on your solution. Drive sign-ups to waitlist or early access. Position against alternatives.

phases.name: conversion
phases.label: Launch & Conversion
phases.goal: Drive purchases, sign-ups, or activations. Maximum urgency and social proof. This is the sprint.

spokeCadence.influencerTouchpoints: Coordinated launch day posts from all partners

phases.name: retention
phases.label: Post-Launch Retention
phases.goal: Onboard new users, reduce churn, collect feedback, and plant seeds for the next campaign cycle.
themeBank: Quick Wins: Get Value in 5 Minutes
